nodes.name: ⏰ 8 PM PHT Daily
nodes.notes:
Fires at 8:00 PM PHT daily to pull the day's performance data.
Run at night so YouTube's 2-3 day data lag catches up on recent posts.

nodes.name: 📊 Get Scheduled Posts
nodes.notes:
Pulls all rows with Status = 'Scheduled' from the Content Tracker.
These are posts that have been published but not yet analyzed.

nodes.name: ▶️ YT – Find Video
nodes.notes:
Searches your YouTube channel for the video by File Code Name to get its videoId.
Set env var YT_CHANNEL_ID to your YouTube channel ID.

nodes.name: ▶️ YT – Get Stats
nodes.notes:
Fetches viewCount, likeCount, commentCount for the found video.
YouTube Data API v3 → /videos?part=statistics.

nodes.name: 🎵 TikTok – List Videos
nodes.notes:
TikTok Content Posting API → /video/list/ returns the creator's recent videos
with view_count, like_count, comment_count, share_count.
Requires scope: video.list
Returns up to 20 most recent videos.

nodes.name: 📸 IG – Get Media Insights
nodes.notes:
Instagram Graph API → /{ig_user_id}/media with inline insights.
Uses the new unified 'views' metric (post-April 2025 deprecation of 'plays').
Also pulls reach, likes, comments, shares, saved.
Set env var IG_USER_ID.

nodes.name: 📘 FB – Get Reel Insights
nodes.notes:
Facebook Graph API → /{page_id}/video_reels with nested video_insights.
Set env var FB_PAGE_ID.

nodes.name: 📈 Aggregate All Stats
nodes.notes:
Merges stats from all 4 platforms into a unified analytics object.
Matches videos by searching captions/titles for the File Code Name.
Calculates total views, engagement rate, top platform, and performance tier.

nodes.name: 📊 Log to Analytics Sheet
nodes.notes:
Appends analytics data to the 'Analytics' sheet tab.
Create a tab called 'Analytics' with columns:
Date | File Code Name | Total Views | YT Views | TT Views | IG Views | FB Views | Likes | Comments | Shares | Engagement Rate | Top Platform | Tier

nodes.name: 📊 Status → Published
nodes.notes:
Updates the main tracker from 'Scheduled' to 'Published' so the Analyst
doesn't re-pull this row tomorrow.

values.content:
You are a data-driven short-form video analyst. You will receive performance data for recent Roblox videos posted across TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and Facebook Reels.

Analyze the data and output a concise 3-sentence insight:
1. Which video performed best and WHY you think it worked (reference the hook, pacing, or topic).
2. Which platform drove the most views and what that tells us about the audience.
3. One specific, actionable recommendation for tomorrow's content based on the patterns.

Be specific and data-driven. No fluff.

nodes.name: 🧠 AI Performance Insight
nodes.notes:
Analyzes the aggregated stats and generates a 3-sentence actionable insight.
Low temperature (0.5) for analytical precision.

nodes.name: 📱 Send Performance Digest
nodes.notes:
Sends the daily performance digest with per-platform breakdown,
engagement metrics, performance tier, and AI-generated insight.
